```json
{
  "baseline_commit": "a1b2c3d4",
  "root_cause": "The payments service opens a new DB connection per request and never closes it; under load the pool is exhausted, surfacing as 5xx PgTimeout.",
  "proposed_fix": "Reuse a pooled *sql.DB, call rows.Close(), and cap MaxOpenConns. See handler.go:142.",
  "confidence": "medium",
  "limitations": "Analyzed statically; could not reproduce against a live DB."
}
```
